keys.noTenantBody: You are signed in, but no workspace is linked to this account yet. If you already completed payment, request a sign-in code again so we can attach your tenant; if provisioning failed, use Continue setup once a workspace appears. Contact support if this message persists.
keys.subscriptionSyncPending: Payment details may take a minute to sync from Stripe after checkout.
keys.noPaymentsYet: No payments recorded yet for this account.
keys.portalWorkAppDesc: Sign in with your work email and Work password from the credentials email
keys.portalWorkDeskDesc: Frappe workspace — use your work email and Work password at the login page
keys.portalDisabledFailed: Provisioning failed — contact support or continue setup.
keys.portalDisabledInProgress: Provisioning in progress — portals unlock when setup completes.
keys.portalDisabledSetup: Complete workspace setup to open portals.
